name: THYMIC CYST

demographics.Frequency: very uncommon lesion; 1-2% of mediastinal masses
demographics.Age: ⅔ in 1st decade; ⅓ in 2nd + 3rd decades; M > F
demographics.Path: unilocular thin-walled cyst with thymic tissue
demographics.Histo: squamous / cuboidal / respiratory epithelium in cyst wall; lobulated lymphoid tissue in

discriminating_features: unilocular cyst with thin walls containing clear fluid / multilocular cyst with thick walls
direct extension / fibrous cord along migratory tract of thymic tissue into mediastinum in 50%:
low-density fluid (0-10 HU), may be higher depending on cyst contents

general: unilocular cyst with thin walls containing clear fluid / multilocular cyst with thick walls
direct extension / fibrous cord along migratory tract of thymic tissue into mediastinum in 50%:
low-density fluid (0-10 HU), may be higher depending on cyst contents
